summary: Plan-only remediation inventory over five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned. None has complete merge preflight proof for a merge recommendation; each item needs maintainer or follow-up preflight before finalization.

actions.reason: Candidate may be useful, but pending checks and missing Codex /review preflight block merge. Because maintainer_can_modify=false, repair or replacement cannot be planned safely until checks settle and any failures are known.
Broad compatibility-impacting plugin API feature with failing proof/boundary checks. The artifact does not include enough failure detail to build a narrow repair artifact, and merge is blocked.
Checks look favorable, but broad config/session-state behavior and unresolved review-bot/Codex preflight proof block a merge recommendation under the merge policy.
Message-delivery and compatibility PR with failed behavior proof and unresolved automated review history. Merge is blocked, and the artifact does not expose a narrow concrete repair path.
This appears closest to merge-ready, but merge policy requires complete merge preflight with passed Codex /review and current mergeability proof before a merge_candidate action.

needs_human: #93580: wait for pending checks to settle, then decide whether to replace the uneditable contributor branch or merge if all required preflight passes.
#18860: maintainer judgment needed on broad plugin hook API plus failed behavior/boundary checks; failure details are needed before any repair artifact.
#22439: maintainer judgment needed on broad tiered bootstrap/config behavior and unresolved Greptile/Codex-review preflight before merge.
#53467: maintainer judgment needed because behavior proof failed and prior automated review findings lack resolved evidence.
#90450: likely merge candidate after a fresh Codex /review and mergeability check, but current artifact lacks that proof.
